mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_question (user_id, question_id, wrong_answer, correct_answer, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{wrongAnswer}, #{correctAnswer}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wrong_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, question_id, wrong_answer, correct_answer, create_time FROM wrong_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT id, user_id, question_id, wrong_answer, correct_answer, create_time FROM wrong_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND question_id = #{questionId} LIMIT 1

SELECT w.id, w.user_id, w.question_id, w.wrong_answer, w.correct_answer, DATE_FORMAT(w.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as create_time, q.content, q.options, q.answer, q.analysis, q.chapter, q.type, q.difficulty, q.image_url FROM wrong_question w LEFT JOIN question q ON w.question_id = q.id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY w.id DESC LIMIT 50
